programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E27 - Wishing Tree
programme.desc: Evil Pea blows all the lanterns away during the Lantern Festival. Supertato struggles to get them all back and needs Broccoli's help to save the day.

programme.title: E69 - Toast
programme.desc: The Teletubbies eat lots of Tubby Toast and make a huge pile of crumbs. Luckily, The Noo-Noo is on hand to clean up.

programme.title: E3 - Top
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'top' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: E19 - Rusty Robot
programme.desc: When Stan Tall starts to develop rust, it's up to Messy to help.

programme.title: E9 - Pirate Parade
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo fix Ted up as a pirate ship for the Pirate Parade, but swashbuckling Cap'n Dot hijacks him! Team Mojo must out-pirate Dot and sail the streets to stop her.

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E14 - The Shopping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: E13 - The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: E25 - Taxi
programme.desc: Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: E39 - Exercise
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: E40 - Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: E13 - Andy And The Chinstrap Penguins
programme.desc: Andy blasts off in his safari sub to Antarctica in search of chinstrap penguin chicks.

programme.title: E9 - Ball
programme.desc: Bella and Lift have fun playing with their favourite red bouncy ball. It drops into the Ice Disco, giving Hettie the Yeti an idea for a bouncy dance!

programme.title: E40 - The Imagination Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels tell Duggee that they have nothing left to play with, he encourages them to use their imagination.

programme.title: E11 - Harbin Ice City, China
programme.desc: GrimHQ overheats so lands in Harbin Ice City, melting the amazing ice sculptures.

programme.title: E10 - Go Jet Academy: Hailstorm
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters brand new click-on save the GoJet Academy from a glitched thunderstorm?

programme.title: E38 - Cinema Scoot
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck join Scooter Boy at the cinema to watch his favourite film.

programme.title: E40 - Ribbon Alvida
programme.desc: An excited Sarah & Duck take the Shallots to see the Ribbon Sisters perform with their family circus.

programme.title: E13 - Farm
programme.desc: Amare asks Stanley to help her on the farm. Stanley asks Little Woo, Fred and Fifi to join him in sowing seeds, watering plants and picking apples, all whilst having fun.

programme.title: E12 - Shop
programme.desc: Stanley covers Jose at the shop and ends up making too much popcorn. So as not to waste it all, Stanley and his friends put on a film night to screen Little Woo's film.

programme.title: E22 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Underground Wonders
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts explore a cave system and discover there's a whole other world underground, with a river, rock formations, and an array of amazing creatures.

programme.title: Fossil Finds
programme.desc: Eric learns that fossils are like fingerprints left behind by prehistoric plants or animals. He makes some modern-day fossils using toy dinosaurs and flour.

programme.title: Kite Shenanigans
programme.desc: Eric builds a new kite. He makes sure it is symmetrical – both sides are exactly the same – as that helps kites fly and stay balanced in the air. He learns that there are lots of different types of kites but they all need the wind to fly.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... The Mountain
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Mountain. He has a nasty itch that he just can't scratch and it's up to Henry to save the day.

programme.title: Fossil Finds
programme.desc: Eric learns that fossils are like fingerprints left behind by prehistoric plants or animals. He makes some modern-day fossils using toy dinosaurs and flour.

programme.title: Kite Shenanigans
programme.desc: Eric builds a new kite. He makes sure it is symmetrical – both sides are exactly the same – as that helps kites fly and stay balanced in the air. He learns that there are lots of different types of kites but they all need the wind to fly.

programme.title: Arrivals and Departures
programme.desc: Ice dancer Josh has a new partner, Lucy, but they have just weeks to pull off their first public performance. Ice hockey player Rais receives an offer he can't refuse, and figure skaters Josh and Kloe are preparing for a big international competition.

programme.title: Bouncing Back
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the Acrobatic Men's Four are invited to trials for the World Championships - but when it comes to costumes for the day, they realise their performance on the floor is not their only concern!

programme.title: Artists of the Environment
programme.desc: Philippe travels to spectacular places on earth. He explores the different ways an environmental painter, sculptor, photographer and craftsman blend nature with art.

programme.title: Fossil Finds
programme.desc: Eric learns that fossils are like fingerprints left behind by prehistoric plants or animals. He makes some modern-day fossils using toy dinosaurs and flour.

programme.title: Kite Shenanigans
programme.desc: Eric builds a new kite. He makes sure it is symmetrical – both sides are exactly the same – as that helps kites fly and stay balanced in the air. He learns that there are lots of different types of kites but they all need the wind to fly.

programme.title: Hottentots Holland Nature Reserve - On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When travelling across a mountain range, the team must cross a dangerous narrow gorge while hanging off cables between heaven and earth. When they discover the only way forward is to jump into a giant waterfall, the team has to make a tough decision.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing ping-pong when Alim arrives and they offer him a pink racket. But is pink for girls only? Alim takes them to Thailand, where they meet a boy in a pink shirt and learn that in Thailand, colors of clothing match the days of the week, not gender!

programme.title: The Underground Wonders
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts explore a cave system and discover there's a whole other world underground, with a river, rock formations, and an array of amazing creatures.

programme.title: The Mystery of Alex's Weak Kick
programme.desc: Addison has to figure out why Alex can't kick a soccer ball nearly as well as he used to, in order to correct his game in time for him to pass the team tryouts. Alex thinks he's jinxed, but Donnie has a vested interest in making sure Alex doesn't make the team.

programme.title: Big Top Doki
programme.desc: Doki is sure giants don't exist until they're invited to come and be giants, at a giants' festival. But how can we be giants? They set off to Douai, France to find out! On arrival, they literally run into two giants.

programme.title: Straw
programme.desc: Reduce waste by giving straws a second more fun life!

programme.title: Plastic Bag
programme.desc: Why throw the plastic bags away? Upcycling and reusing are Hepi and Briko's favourite things to do.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Jesters
programme.desc: Lord Roach is feeling really down! His wife Geraldine goes out of her way to entertain him, bringing in acrobats, musicians, etc. But it's no good. Enter Little Lewis, dressed in his court jester costume and Lord Roach is very happy.

programme.title: Trip to Japan
programme.desc: Alim finds Zoe and Milo in a messy pancake-making scene. They laugh when asked if school teaches cleaning. Alim takes them to Japan, where Akiko shows that students not only study but also take turns cleaning and helping in the canteen.

programme.title: I've Got a Lovely Bunch of Coconuts
programme.desc: Monkey has found a coconut which he is very eager to eat. This turns out to be harder than he anticipated. Try as he might he just cannot get it open until...

programme.title: Field of Giants
programme.desc: Fontaine and Smiling Finn get stuck inside a closing giant clam as the pirates battle the Nektons for the pearl within!

programme.title: Your Heartbeat
programme.desc: The doctors super-size the heart to investigate the piece of body kit that makes it beat. We meet a Brilliant Body para-cyclist who uses brain power to cycle faster. Meanwhile, Connie comes in with a shaky leg, and Marley has a toothpick stuck in his foot!

programme.title: Your Heartbeat

programme.desc: Devil Daniels thinks he is hunting a mythical creature whose song lures sailors to their doom. The Nektons discover it's a rare whale.

programme.desc: One of the Junior Vets must confront his fear of goats, there's an emergency during surgery on a pet rabbit, and thirty-two thousand patients are waiting at a farm.

programme.desc: Doc doesn't want a machine to replace him so he gets into a competition with an AI; a case forces Martina to come to terms with her conscience; in order to keep one of Andrea's secrets safe, Agnese must make a horrible choice.

programme.title: Around The World In 80 Days
programme.desc: It is 1872, and a British inventor, a Chinese thief and a French artist set off to circumnavigate the globe in 80 days. They travel by land, air, sea, and in-line skates in order to beat the clock and finish where they started.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: E108 - #TextingCompetition
programme.desc: Cat discovers Sam is really fast at texting and convinces her to compete in a texting competition against a sweet boy, Butler, who has an overbearing mom. Dice tries to avoid an annoying old friend.

programme.title: E718 - Let's Break A Deal / A Dish Come True
programme.desc: Rusty strikes a deal with Morpheus that for a seemingly small price, Morpheus will cast spells for him. // Lincoln starts to work at Dad's restaurant when he hears that the best employee wins a dish named in their honor.

programme.title: E126 - Study Muffin / Homespun
programme.desc: Lincoln gets a tutor that all his sisters instantly get crushes on, making it impossible for Lincoln to study. // The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

programme.title: E110 - All About Steve
programme.desc: Billy arrives, hopeful that his new sidekick Steve can join the T-Force. Phoebe and Max consider it, but soon discover that his superpower is making marshmallows. After they reject Steve's bid to join the team, he turns evil and vows revenge.

programme.title: E120 - #MadAboutShoe
programme.desc: When Sam eats all of the moon meatballs Cat prepared for a Special Moon Dinner, Cat has to make more. Cat gets distracted when she finds a shoe and becomes obsessed with finding its matching pair.

programme.title: E208 - The Night Ninja Returns
programme.desc: The villainous, dog-hating madman known as SCRATCH holds the city's dogs hostage! His only demand? For the Night Ninja to surrender! But Leo, April and the Turtles realize there's more to Scratch than meets the eye.

programme.title: E115 - Taken to the Cleaners / Mugshot
programme.desc: Best and Bester go on an undercover mission to find out why items of laundry are going missing at the Dry Cleaners. // In an unfortunate case of mistaken identity, Best has been mistaken for the notorious jewel thief, Jimmy Muggins.

programme.title: E113 - Nitwit Neighborhood News / The Patrick Show MidSeason Finale
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina report the news around Bikini Bottom. // The Patrick Show presents the epic conclusion to the first half of its first season.

programme.title: E126 - Study Muffin / Homespun
programme.desc: Lincoln gets a tutor that all his sisters instantly get crushes on, making it impossible for Lincoln to study. // The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

programme.title: E210 - The Real Woori World / The Collector
programme.desc: Min tries to avoid the usual Woori World chaos, but when the family splits up they all get lost in their own fiascos. // Jack's mission to find the rare DVD sequel of his favorite movie leads him to the mysterious Collector.

programme.title: E109 - #RevengeOfTheBritBrats
programme.desc: British con artists Gwen and Ruby return and, while pretending to be friendly, drive a wedge between Sam and Cat. When Sam and Cat catch on to this, they turn the tables on Gwen and Ruby.

programme.title: E202 - Now Museum, Now You Don't
programme.desc: Cecil works a new temp job as a security guard at Lady Upturn's art museum.

programme.title: E319 - Making Waves / Captain Quasar: The Next Iteration
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton are forced to spend time together when they accidentally book the same room on a cruise. // SpongeBob and Bubble Bass butt heads over which version of Quasar is better.

programme.title: E110 - All About Steve
programme.desc: Billy arrives, hopeful that his new sidekick Steve can join the T-Force. Phoebe and Max consider it, but soon discover that his superpower is making marshmallows. After they reject Steve's bid to join the team, he turns evil and vows revenge.

programme.title: E208 - The Night Ninja Returns
programme.desc: The villainous, dog-hating madman known as SCRATCH holds the city's dogs hostage! His only demand? For the Night Ninja to surrender! But Leo, April and the Turtles realize there's more to Scratch than meets the eye.

programme.title: E210 - The Real Woori World / The Collector
programme.desc: Min tries to avoid the usual Woori World chaos, but when the family splits up they all get lost in their own fiascos. // Jack's mission to find the rare DVD sequel of his favorite movie leads him to the mysterious Collector.

programme.title: E2 - You Play With Fire, You Might Get Burned
programme.desc: Tensions mount in Cayuga as a frightening crash occurs on the drag strip moments before Chris is set to perform his incredibly dangerous first night race of the season alongside his still untested Crew Chief, Wayner.

programme.desc: The Internet's best hunting, fishing, and all around outdoor viral videos. Brought to you all in one show with special guest Clayton Coyle.

programme.title: E14 - Columbia
programme.desc: Catfish and Rooftop go on a mission with the Colombian military's anti-narcotics division, test bulletproof clothing on themselves and experience the most painful insect sting in the world.

programme.title: E9 - Obstacle Enduro
programme.desc: Matt takes the team through a 6 hour obstacle enduro at Raw Challenge on the Gold Coast before the series wrap-up and the announcement of our Most Savage for the season.

programme.title: E3 - Always Bet on Dot
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: E5 - Second Chances
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWTNewly minted copilot Jeff Tapper is excited for his first revenue DC-3, but his inexperience shows when he botches the approach and bounces the landing three times, nearly running off the runway. Meanwhile, for new rampie Prefkar Mony to realize his dream of becoming a DC-3 pilot, he needs to first pass the written IATRA test. He’s been studying for months, but on his first attempt, he fails. With the help of pilot/mechanic Chris Staples, Prefkar retakes the test and passes, but his victory celebration is short-lived when he’s blamed for leaving an expensive shipment of medicine marked “Do Not Freeze” in a courier van during a minus 30 weekend. Later, Mikey and Katie decide to find Joe a new dog and choose Muffy, a three-year-old dog from the SPCA who is ready to leave her pups. They bring her back to the hangar for a test drive. Joe brings DC-3 CUE out of retirement to test fly the plane for Buffalo’s summer sked duty and he brings along Jeff—and Muffy—to see if they’re

programme.title: E5 - Second Chances
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWTNewly minted copilot Jeff Tapper is excited for his first revenue DC-3, but his inexperience shows when he botches the approach and bounces the landing three times, nearly running off the runway. Meanwhile, for new rampie Prefkar Mony to realize his dream of becoming a DC-3 pilot, he needs to first pass the written IATRA test. He’s been studying for months, but on his first attempt, he fails. With the help of pilot/mechanic Chris Staples, Prefkar retakes the test and passes, but his victory celebration is short-lived when he’s blamed for leaving an expensive shipment of medicine marked “Do Not Freeze” in a courier van during a minus 30 weekend. Later, Mikey and Katie decide to find Joe a new dog and choose Muffy, a three-year-old dog from the SPCA who is ready to leave her pups. They bring her back to the hangar for a test drive. Joe brings DC-3 CUE out of retirement to test fly the plane for Buffalo’s summer sked duty and he brings along Jeff—and Muffy—to see if they’re

Mumbai Fishers Battle Climate Change And Modernization
programme.desc: In Mumbai, climate change is eroding trust among the Koli fishing community. Plus: In Cambodia, rising heat and flooding disrupt children's education.

programme.title: The Worldwide Materials Transition
programme.desc: From Venezuela's extra heavy crude oil to Trump's focus on Greenland's rare earths to Germany's F60 steel giants and illegal gold mines in Indonesia: How raw materials impact landscapes, people, and politics.

programme.title: Whispers Of The Earth - How Our Planet Came To Be - Part 2
programme.desc: Earth influences all life on our planet. The same is true in reverse: Animals, plants, and inanimate matter also shape habitats. But humans are currently changing this dynamic cycle.

programme.title: Svalbard: Russia's Arctic 'Trump Card' Against Nato
programme.desc: The remote island group of Svalbard - it is NATO territory but a hundred-year-old treaty grants access to dozens of countries - including Russia. And Russia is using it to build up a strategic foothold in the Arctic.

programme.title: Uganda's Urban Water Fix: Low-Cost Tech That Cleans Groundwater
programme.desc: A low-cost technology is being used to purify groundwater and recycled wastewater in Uganda. Also: Urban Nigerians embrace sack farming.

programme.title: Blind Youth In Delhi Use Acroyoga To Overcome Exclusion
programme.desc: In Delhi, visually impaired youth deal with exclusion and fear in a chaotic city. But through acroyoga, they build trust and confidence, defying disability and societal neglect. Yoga helps them connect with their bodies and reclaim visibility in a world that often overlooks them.

programme.title: Nietzsche Explained: Why A 19Th Century Rebel Feels So Gen Z
programme.desc: Nietzsche Explained: from 'God is dead” to the Ubermensch, hype culture and Kanye West. More than 125 years after his death, Friedrich Nietzsche has become a surprising icon for Gen Z and Gen Alpha. His sharp critiques of morality, religion, and society feel uncannily modern in an age of social media, burnout, and constant self-optimization.

programme.title: Mercedes: Iconic German Brand Or Three-Pointed Fallen Star?
programme.desc: Pummeled by Trump's tariffs and fierce competition in China, Mercedes-Benz's operating profits plunged in 2025. Why is its CEO upbeat? Plus: How e-bikes are making Ugandans life easier and test driving Kia's PV5.

E3 - Aboard The Glacier Express, From Zermatt To Saint Moritz
programme.desc: The Glacier Express lays claim to being Switzerland's slowest express train. From the Matterhorn to Engandin, it offers its passengers an unforgettable voyage between Zermatt and Saint Moritz, a journey that includes 291 bridges, 91 tunnels and a chance to appreciate some truly breathtaking scenery.

programme.title: E67
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E4 - From The Three Lakes Region To Geneva, Via Lavaux
programme.desc: The Jura Foot railway line is one of the most beautiful in Switzerland. Lake Biel, Lake Neuchatel and on further south, the train wends its way to the wine-producing region of Lavaux. The journey then continues along the shores of Lake Geneva before ending in Geneva itself.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E1 - The Woodland Troop
programme.desc: In this small patch of woodland, two young monkeys face the toughest time of their lives. As they find their place in the world, they must learn which neighbors are allies, and which are foes. Who to trust, and who to avoid. They will suffer loss, and gain friends, as they discover what it means to be part of the Woodland Troop.

programme.title: E5 - A Bear’s Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Spy on the summer cubs as they learn to climb trees and forage for food in preparation for their release into the wild. Get surprised by a set of new arrivals, observe the annual pre-hibernation eating binge, and enjoy a bear-friendly Thanksgiving.

programme.title: E2 - Better Together
programme.desc: The wilds of Zambia are a tough place to live. Here, many animals must come together in groups to help defend territory, protect offspring, find food and overcome predators.

programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit Mrs Badger's petting farm where they meet lots of little animals and learn it's important to wash your hands.

programme.desc: Granny Pig, Peppa and George have fun dressing up as Romans, making a pebble mosaic and learning a little Latin!

programme.title: Distinction
programme.desc: Ms Tsui is a music teacher in a special education needs (SEN) school, who is not able to switch to a mainstream school due to stereotyping and labelling; Zoey is an underachiever from a Band 1 school, who is struggling for the coming public examination; Ka Ho is a rebellious teenager from a Band 3 school, who idles away his time and doesn't care about his handicapped little brother...Fate drives the three to take part in a musical they deem worthless for their own purposes, which turns out to be a journey of self-discovery towards their dreams and goals.

programme.title: Madalena
programme.desc: Early spring in the city of Macau. Mada (Louis Cheung), a divorced man in his 40's, is the strong and silent type. He lives in a dilapidated flat that's set for demolition. Suffering from a serious case of amnesia, Mada works the graveyard shift as a taxi driver to overcome the pain of his affliction. One night, Mada picks up Lena (Chrissie Chau), who works as a restaurant receptionist by day and a bar hostess by night. After a misunderstanding sparks spark their friendship, Mada becomes Lena's driver, picking her up before and after work. Lena's arrival finally brings some color into Mada's life; he even begins to think that he can finally move on from his divorce. Yet, Lena feels lonely in Macau; she's disliked by her colleagues, who all think that she is a ruthless, money-grubbing hustler for using her voluptuous figure to get special treatment. Lena knows Mada's feelings for her, but she, too, is hiding a past that she can't get over...

programme.title: A Guilty Conscience
programme.desc: In a moment of irresponsible negligence, sharp-tongued barrister Adrian Lam mishandles a child abuse case and indirectly sentences the innocent Jolene Tsang to prison for 17 years. Falling from disgrace, Adrian decides to serve the public and defend the commoners, until an unlikely opportunity for appeal surfaces. Determined to right his wrong, Adrian gathers former partners Evelyn Fong and Prince to free Jolene, but that would mean fighting against the tycoons, Victoria and Desmond Chung, who also have barrister James Tung as their private consultant. With pressure from media and police, and facing tough cross examination from prosecutor Kam Yuen Shan in court, how will Adrian uphold justice and punish the true culprit?

programme.title: Keep Chasing: Under the Light
programme.desc: Su Jianming, the son of Deputy Mayor Zheng Gang of Jinjiang City, defies his father's counsel and attends a cunning dinner invitation from the wealthiest man in Jinjiang City, Li Zhitian. To his astonishment, he becomes an unwilling witness to a shocking incident where someone is coerced into thrusting their hand into a simmering hotpot. As past mysteries resurface, hidden factions from various quarters plot and scheme, employing intricate strategies, scrutiny, and suspicion. Amidst the web of conflicting desires, the pressing question remains: who will ultimately unveil the final mask?

programme.title: Character
programme.desc: Reality and fiction clash in demented ways in this serial killer thriller by award-winning advertisement director Akira Nagai. Reuniting with Nagai after his maniacally fun performance in Teiichi: Battle of Supreme High, Japanese cinema's “It Boy”, Masaki Suda, reveals his dark side as Keigo, a talented illustrator who is way too nice to write a villain in his comics. After witnessing the death of a family at the hands of a terrifying murderer, Keigo draws the murderer into his comic 34 and ends up creating a runaway hit. Co-starring Shun Oguri as a police detective chasing the serial killer, Character is a hair-raising chiller packed with unpredictable twists.

programme.title: Living In Two Worlds
programme.desc: Dai is born to deaf parents and has been raised with deep love in rural Japan. However, as he grows older, he becomes troubled by his differences from others and begins to blame his deaf mother for his daily frustrations. When he turns 20, Dai leaves home for Tokyo as if to escape. Life in Tokyo was lonely at first, but when Dai starts working as a magazine reporter, he finds fulfillment in meeting a diverse group of people. Time eventually passes, and Dai returns home for the first time in eight years. In spending peaceful time with his deaf mother after a long time, a memory that has been sealed away unexpectedly comes back to Dai.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E261 -THE SHADOW'S EDGE
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: E16 - The Mysterious Havana Syndrome
programme.desc: In 2016, an illness strikes dozens of government officials in Cuba. Over the next few years, hundreds more are afflicted. But investigations raise more questions than answers about this bizarre epidemic.

programme.title: E4 - Secrets From The Skies
programme.desc: From a long-lost keepsake tied to the world's most famous astronaut to a giant flying reptile that once ruled the skies... Some extraordinary discoveries remind us to keep looking up.

programme.title: E12 - In And Out
programme.desc: A daring rocket and helicopter experiment results in the team witnessing a phenomenon that might prove an ancient legend about Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: E4 - Treasure Island
programme.desc: With weather preventing Darrell Miklos and the team from diving from the boat, they attempt a risky strategy. Garth makes a solo journey to explore a deserted island where he discovers a mysterious cross.

programme.desc: This show highlights professionals at the very forefront of their fields - we showcase their amazing work, discover their motivations, and learn about the challenges they face in the future.

programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: E6056-002
programme.desc: Take a drive in Kagoshima - after circling the ever-erupting Sakurajima, we head to the southern tip for a sand bath which utilises geothermal energy and where you'll feel the vitality of the Earth!

programme.title: Tandem Ng Bayan[Live]
programme.desc: Teleradyo Program

programme.title: Brgy[Live]
programme.desc: 'BRGY' is a daily talk-magazine-lifestyle show that celebrates stories about Filipinos by Filipinos. The show aims to bring home every Filipino wherever they are in the world. Sharing and conversations won't be limited to one space but it can be wherever your heart feel at ease.

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues & Weasel's Fails!
programme.desc: Get ready for epic rescues & Mr. Weasel's hilarious fails! The chaos begins when Weasel fills Max the Monster Truck's tires with helium, causing him to float away & forcing Gecko to perform a sky-high rescue! Then, Weasel's plan to give Molly extra bouncy springs goes wrong, & Gecko has to help her stop bouncing. The rescues continue when Weasel's new electro-magnet sucks up Baby Truck & the Mechanicals, & Gecko has to save the day!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: E5 - Super Creative Day of Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E10 - Siblings Month: Family Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Celebrate Siblings Month with family fun & learning! First, JJ finds his family members all around the house, discovering what each of them does, from playing guitar to painting. Then, join the siblings as they bake a tasty cake together for a special treat! The learning continues as YoYo teaches JJ to love vegetables, the kids race balloon cars & they learn the days of the week through playful activities. It's a month full of family, fun & learning!

programme.title: E4 - Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning to play together with blocks, dancing, football & storytime! First, Jeff's neat block towers keep getting knocked over by Bubbles, & they must learn to share their space. Then, Fuse refuses to listen to instructions during a dancing game & has to learn how to work as a team. The lessons continue as Bubbles learns not to cheat to win a football game & Jeff has to decide if he will share his new book during storytime.

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E2 - A Day of Cody's Favorite Things!
programme.desc: Join Cody for a day filled with all his favorite things! First, Cody gets to live out his dino dreams as he dons a dinosaur costume & pretends to be a monster attacking a toy bridge. The fun continues at school, where he starts playing a guitar & his classmates join in to form their very own rock band! Cody also shows his caring side as he & his friends encounter a lost baby duckling & lead the way to help it find the perfect home.

programme.title: E4 - Siblings Month: Cody's New Sister!
programme.desc: Celebrate Siblings Month with Cody as he welcomes his new sister, Kendi! First, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother & helps his family prepare. Then, he excitedly welcomes Kendi home & takes on the role of responsible big brother, helping her get to sleep. The sibling bonding continues as they play peek-a-boo, bounce balloons & make funny faces in the mirror. Watch as Cody learns to share & be the best big brother ever!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Welcome for the New Magic Pets!
programme.desc: Get ready to welcome some new Magic Pets with Mila & Morphle! The adventure begins when they meet Shrubcub, a pet whose power is to make plants grow, causing a huge flowery jungle to bloom in Pet Port! Then, they meet Slushyseal, who can change items into juice pops, but the friends have to stop him when he starts turning all the trees & flowers into frozen treats! From a pet that swaps bodies to one that hypnotizes animals, it's a day full of new & magical friends!

programme.title: E5 - Fun and Games with All Our Friends!
programme.desc: It's time for fun & games with all our friends! First, Jill is shy at her first mermaid swimming class, but she learns to have fun & trust herself with the help of her friends. Then, during a Mexican posada, Manny teaches Baby John how to build a piñata. After he gets over being a little scared of the blindfold, he has lots of fun! The fun continues as the friends learn to compromise when they have opposite ideas for playtime.

programme.title: E2 - A Day of Cody's Favorite Things!
programme.desc: Join Cody for a day filled with all his favorite things! First, Cody gets to live out his dino dreams as he dons a dinosaur costume & pretends to be a monster attacking a toy bridge. programme.title: E123
programme.desc: The 113th Drama Serial, inspired by the lives of Koizumi Setsu and Lafcadio Hearn also known as Koizumi Yakumo, portrays those who were left behind in the rapidly Westernizing Meiji era. programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: Bury Me High
programme.desc: This is a film about one of the practical metaphysics of the Orient - Geomancy. The Orientals believe fervently that a good burial site endows fame and fortune on its descendants. When the story begins, two geomancers are roaming Indochina's wilderness trying to find the dream grave site. They find The Conqueror, a site generating wealth and power - also a bloodbath. Nguen wants it but Wei wants no bloodbath. They have a fight. Wei escapes by the skin of his teeth. Wei rewards the poor man who saved him by finding him a good grave site. Many years later, Anna who is believed to be the daughter of the poor man, heads an American computer empire. Wei's son, Wisely, is a famous traveler. The girl asks him to go to Indochina to trace their roots...

programme.title: Bury Me High
programme.desc: This is a film about one of the practical metaphysics of the Orient - Geomancy. The Orientals believe fervently that a good burial site endows fame and fortune on its descendants. When the story begins, two geomancers are roaming Indochina's wilderness trying to find the dream grave site. They find The Conqueror, a site generating wealth and power - also a bloodbath. Nguen wants it but Wei wants no bloodbath. They have a fight. Wei escapes by the skin of his teeth. Wei rewards the poor man who saved him by finding him a good grave site. Many years later, Anna who is believed to be the daughter of the poor man, heads an American computer empire. Wei's son, Wisely, is a famous traveler. The girl asks him to go to Indochina to trace their roots...

programme.title: Tiger Cage II
programme.desc: David is a young lawyer who launders money for a gang leader in Chinatown. He is robbed and his assistant got killed when he carries a large sum of cash to Hong Kong. David turns to Waise, his law school buddy, for help. He doesn't realize that it is Waise who sets up the robbery. Petty, Waise's partner in the law firm, finds out that Waise has conducted some illegal activities. Before she could unveil the truth to the police, Petty is murdered. To cover up the truth, Waise finds Mandy, a promising solicitor, as scapegoat of Petty's death. Waise also sends out a gunman to track down Mandy. In a last minute rescue, Mandy is saved by one of her client, Dragon. She always finds the client obnoxious, but now she has to team up with Dragon to fight back and to prove her innocence at the same time...

programme.title: Mission Of Justice
programme.desc: BULLET and MOON are two tough ladies who are out to bust the biggest drug syndicate in Thailand and they only have ten days to do it! Nothing is beyond these fighting women as they enter the Golden triangle unafraid because they are on a “MISSION OF JUSTICE”! Through the jungle they pursue the dangerous Yie Feng as they track her into the very heart of Cala. Working under-cover they both find their lives at risk to the deadly Drug Lords. Only their superior fighting skills can keep them from being killed...

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E47
programme.desc: 《長安十二時辰》改編自馬伯庸的同名小説，講述了唐朝上元節前夕，長安城陷入危局，長安死囚張小敬臨危受命，與李必攜手在十二時辰內拯救長安的故事。

programme.title: E42
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.desc: 《長安十二時辰》改編自馬伯庸的同名小説，講述了唐朝上元節前夕，長安城陷入危局，長安死囚張小敬臨危受命，與李必攜手在十二時辰內拯救長安的故事。

programme.title: E47
programme.desc: 《長安十二時辰》改編自馬伯庸的同名小説，講述了唐朝上元節前夕，長安城陷入危局，長安死囚張小敬臨危受命，與李必攜手在十二時辰內拯救長安的故事。

programme.title: E42
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: Top Chef S17E14 -Finito!
programme.desc: In an epic Italian showdown, the final three All Stars cook the meal of their lives in an effort to take home the ultimate title and prize. To win, all they’ll need to impress not only the judges - Tom, Padma, Gail and Nilou Motamed, but also culinary superstars Mauro Colagreco, Clare Smyth, Marcus Samuelsson, Janice Wong, Tony Mantuano, Eighth Generation Italian Butcher Dario Cecchini and Food & Wine magazine’s Hunter Lewis. It’s a fight to the bitter end, but only one will have their second chance to finally be crowned Top Chef.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. programme.desc: A collection of outrageous problems that you have never heard of! A great 'knowledge talk show' where problematic children who are struggling and fighting in the emotional rooftop room gain true wisdom about life and the world.

programme.title: E80
programme.desc: A revenge story about a woman in the top 1% starting over from the ground up to reclaim her stolen life and find her true 'home'. A passionate drama of people striving to regain the true meaning of life.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.
